name: libmldbm-perl
title: libmldbm-perl
summary: module for storing multidimensional hash structures in perl tied hashes
description:
module for storing multidimensional hash structures in perl tied hashes
The MLDBM perl module can be used to store multidimensional hash structures
in tied hashes (including DBM files).
.
It depends on the Data::Dumper module and by default uses the
SDBM tied hash. But you can use it with DB_File (and others
DBM modules). You can also use other serializing packages
like Storable and FreezeThaw.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libmldbm-perl because module for storing multidimensional hash structures in perl tied hashes.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libmldbm-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libmldbm-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libmldbm-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
